decision-tree.root-question: What is the year-1 vector count ceiling?

branch.conclusion: Recommend Chroma. Single-process prototype scale, zero infra.

branch.question: Existing Postgres footprint with idle ops capacity?

branch.conclusion: Recommend pgvector. Re-uses existing operational tooling.
Recommend Weaviate. Native hybrid + graph relationships.
Recommend Qdrant (with sparse vectors enabled). Strong filter perf.
Recommend Qdrant. Best filter perf and self-hosting story.
Recommend Pinecone or Qdrant Cloud. Compare on per-vector cost.
Recommend Qdrant or Milvus self-hosted. Add Milvus only if distributed sharding is needed.

example.p: 250k year-1, no Postgres, hybrid required, no graph → Qdrant with sparse vectors → fallbacks: Weaviate (if graph), pgvector (if Postgres ops capacity opens).
